claim_text: DoD announced the first tranche of Replicator capabilities, framing attritable autonomous systems as a fielding priority.
notes: Supports policy and demand reality; not ticker-specific value capture.

claim_text: Defense Innovation Unit public materials describe Replicator as a path to field autonomous systems through non-traditional and commercial technology channels.
notes: Use exact DIU tranche pages before single-company claims.

claim_text: DoD counter-UAS materials identify unmanned systems as a force-protection and operational priority.
notes: Source path should be refreshed to specific strategy or release before external case publication.

claim_text: The FY2026 defense budget source path is required to verify whether autonomy, drones and counter-UAS priorities are funded rather than only policy priorities.
notes: Budget line-item support remains a gating step for single-equity cases.

claim_text: AeroVironment and BlueHalo completed a transaction creating a combined unmanned systems, loitering munitions, space and counter-UAS platform.
notes: Potential direct public-company expression; acquisition value capture and integration risk need single-equity work.

claim_text: AeroVironment filing source path is needed to separate organic growth, acquired BlueHalo contribution, backlog, funded backlog, margin and working-capital risk.
notes: Use exact annual report rows before actionability.

claim_text: Kratos filing source path is needed to separate unmanned systems, target drones, tactical drone programs, margins and funded backlog.
notes: Candidate public expression but not enough for actionability.

claim_text: Palantir filing/source path is needed to test whether defense AI/software demand converts into durable government revenue, margins and program-level value capture.
notes: Software platform read-through is less pure than drone hardware but may capture data/AI layer.

claim_text: Anduril is an important private defense-autonomy expression, which limits direct public-equity purity for the theme.
notes: Private-company signal only; do not use for public-equity actionability.
